name: lumapost
description: LumaPost - 光影邮报：AI 驱动的智能新闻邮件推送系统。支持 10+ AI 模型（DeepSeek/MiniMax/OpenAI/Claude/通义千问/智谱/豆包/Kimi等）、10+ 邮件服务（QQ/网易/Gmail/Outlook/Resend/SendGrid等），GitHub Actions 云端部署，电脑关机也能发。

scripts.send:morning: node scripts/mail-provider.js --send --subject="✨ LumaPost · 光影邮报 · 早报" --body-file=data/morning-email.html
scripts.send:noon: node scripts/mail-provider.js --send --subject="✨ LumaPost · 光影邮报 · 午报" --body-file=data/noon-email.html
scripts.send:afternoon: node scripts/mail-provider.js --send --subject="✨ LumaPost · 光影邮报 · 午后速递" --body-file=data/afternoon-email.html
scripts.send:evening: node scripts/mail-provider.js --send --subject="✨ LumaPost · 光影邮报 · 晚间总结" --body-file=data/evening-email.html
scripts.all:morning: npm run fetch:morning && npm run gen:morning && npm run send:morning
scripts.all:noon: npm run fetch:noon && npm run gen:noon && npm run send:noon
scripts.all:afternoon: npm run fetch:afternoon && npm run gen:afternoon && npm run send:afternoon
scripts.all:evening: npm run fetch:evening && npm run gen:evening && npm run send:evening

author: QiXua
